headline: Cisco Expands AI Agentic Security Portfolio: Will the Tech Deliver?
summary: CSCO gears up for an AI-agent workforce with new identity and security tools, even as security revenue declines and competition intensifies.

raw.headline: Cisco Expands AI Agentic Security Portfolio: Will the Tech Deliver?
raw.summary: CSCO gears up for an AI-agent workforce with new identity and security tools, even as security revenue declines and competition intensifies.

headline: AI and bots have officially taken over the internet, report finds
summary: HUMAN Security's State of AI Traffic report found that bots have eclipsed human users, with automated traffic growing eight times faster than human activity.

raw.headline: AI and bots have officially taken over the internet, report finds
raw.summary: HUMAN Security's State of AI Traffic report found that bots have eclipsed human users, with automated traffic growing eight times faster than human activity.
